mapper.sql: id, invoice_no, customer_id, customer_name, total_amount, settled_amount, tax_number, status, invoice_date, factory_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_fin_invoice (invoice_no, customer_id, customer_name, total_amount, settled_amount, tax_number, status, invoice_date, factory_id, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{invoiceNo}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{totalAmount}, #{settledAmount}, #{taxNumber}, #{status}, #{invoiceDate}, #{factoryId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_fin_invoice SET settled_amount = #{settledAmount}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
